op.text: [as of 2025-06-21] Sailboat Dorothy Jean restoration complete as of 2025-06-21; passed marine survey; scheduled for launch weekend of 2025-07-12 at Cathedral Park boat ramp; first sail planned as gentle afternoon on Columbia River with Sam, Marcus, and four-month-old niece Nina; Priya's dad lending truck and trailer for transport
[as of 2025-06-21] Jogging up to forty minutes as of 2025-06-21; ankle recovery progressing well

On 2025-06-21, regarding Marcus flying out for Dorothy Jean's first sail on weekend of 2025-07-12, said: 'Marcus is flying out for it. With Nina.' and 'He didn't even hesitate when I told him the date — he said "Mom would have required my attendance" and booked flights that night. Nina will be four months old. She obviously won't remember it, but there's going to be a photo of her in a tiny life jacket on our mother's boat, and I need that photo to exist.' (2025-06-21)

On 2025-06-21, regarding first sail of Dorothy Jean, said: 'I keep thinking about the cloud thing — I want to check the sky that morning the way she taught me. If it's a mare's tail sky I'm taking it as a blessing.' (2025-06-21)

op.note: Marcus is now coming to Portland for Dorothy Jean launch weekend 2025-07-12 with Nina (age four months); this fulfills the intent to meet Nina while tiny, though location reversed from planned Denver visit
